notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. All seven 100%-rule omission categories named with specific gap-to-branch mapping and consequence. Activity-vs-deliverable distinction named with chapter's framing and deliverable-form rewrites for every problematic leaf. Decomposition critique covers both depth (small leaves in 1.2.1) and consistency (1.2.2/1.2.3 vs 1.2.1) with explicit reasoning about why the asymmetry matters. Cross-artefact reasoning includes four distinct propagation chains (hypercare-budget, change-mgmt-RAM-risk-reporting, underdeveloped-integration-schedule-critical-path, activity-leaves-status-tracking). Validation move is specific (format, duration, participants, output, coordinator's three jobs explicit), proposes a fallback if half-day impossible, AND pushes back on the COO deadline as the actual constraint. Closes with explicit humility ('two things I am NOT certain on'). This is what every learner should produce.
